ships.title: Take Aaron side chicks off website
ships.description: Take Aaron side chicks off website

draft.preview: Removes the vendor "Arron Side Chicks" from the Eats on 601 site. Two edits: the vendor card in src/content/vendors.json and one lineup reference in the Summer Kickoff event in src/content/events.json. Staged only — live site untouched. See changes.diff; corrected files in scratch/.
draft.summary: Staged the removal of vendor "Arron Side Chicks" (id: arron-side-chicks) from eats-on-601. Note the data spells it "Arron," not "Aaron" — same vendor. Found and removed in exactly two places: the vendor definition in vendors.json and the Summer Kickoff lineup in events.json. No vendor-specific images exist to clean up. Both files re-validated as valid JSON. This is a draft/diff only; I did not apply to the live site or deploy. Approve to apply the two file edits to /Users/MarshallHuff/Eats On 601 Website.
